Function.name: Cong
Function.Description: Tinh tong cua A va B (A + B)

Function.name: Tru
Function.Description: Tinh hieu cua A va B (A - B)

Function.name: Nhan
Function.Description: Tinh tich cua A va B (A * B)

Function.name: Chia
Function.Description: Tinh thuong cua A chia B (A / B), tra ve #DIV/0! neu B = 0

Function.name: TinhTongCoDieuKien
Function.Description: Tinh tong cac gia tri trong vung, co the loc theo dieu kien don gian
Function.Param: Vung du lieu (Range) can tinh tong
Dieu kien loc dang >100, <50, >=10, <=20, =5, <>0 (bo trong = tinh tong tat ca)
